infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: EcoTrack AI uses your location to show nearby eco spots, parks, and green stores.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: EcoTrack AI uses your location to show nearby eco spots, parks, and green stores.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: EcoTrack AI needs camera access to let you take profile and cover photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: EcoTrack AI needs photo library access to let you set profile and cover photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: EcoTrack AI needs to save photos to your library.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: EcoTrack AI needs your location to show nearby eco spots, parks, and green stores.

plugins.photosPermission: EcoTrack AI needs access to your photos to set profile and cover photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: EcoTrack AI needs camera access to take profile and cover photos.
